raw_comment: I notice that in the lower Texas area and LA,The leaves begin to show first in January,and in the Dakotas,Minnesota,Montana and others in the north,the leaves show surprisingly late.I wonder why the order of leaves falling go from the south to north,instead of the east to west. I also wonder if the Leaf growth could have to do with global warming,Like if the temperature becomes troublesome for leaves to sprout
ace_sentences: The fact is that in the lower Texas area and LA, the leaves begin to show first in January.
The fact is that in the Dakotas, Minnesota, Montana, and others in the north, the leaves show surprisingly late.
I wonder why the order of leaves falling goes from the south to north.
I wonder why the order of leaves falling does not go from the east to west.
I also wonder if the leaf growth could have to do with global warming.
I wonder if the temperature becomes troublesome for leaves to sprout.
